extraction.one_line_summary: GROVES Kaden won the sprint after early climbers' breakaway collapsed on descent, timing his launch off KOOIJ Bryan's wheel perfectly center-road
tactical_patterns: Ineos emptied resources early for Hayter sprint setup, then completely failed delivery leaving him isolated without leadout train.
Evenepoel positioned by Roglic through final kilometers suggesting Soudal protecting GC over contesting sprint despite proximity to leader's jersey.
Israel-Premier Tech committed Strong to barriers line creating center-road gap Groves exploited rather than traditional leadout positioning.

rider_signals.EVENEPOEL Remco: neutral: Had confidence to contest sprint but team prioritized GC positioning via Roglic escort through technical finale
rider_signals.HAYTER Ethan: negative: Ineos burned entire team's effort for his sprint yet delivered zero leadout support in final 500m
rider_signals.STRONG Corbin: positive: Went early on barriers showing Israel's willingness to improvise when leadout structure breaks down
rider_signals.KOOIJ Bryan: negative: Led out but lacked power to finish, became unintentional launch pad for Groves despite starting sprint first
rider_signals.GROVES Kaden: positive: Showed tactical patience staying center-road rather than following barriers, timed throw to perfection off Kooij's fade
